_comment: Seed schema for Iva's PERSONAL-MEMORY vault. Hand-authored (no discover/swarm bootstrap). Layout: daily/ raw transcripts; summaries/daily, weekly/, monthly/, yearly/ summary cards (DAG); cards/* entity cards. enrich.py is NOT used — Iva (DeepSeek) makes all tag/link/classification judgments.

daily-summary.description: One-day rollup card: topics of the day + MOC down to created cards and the raw daily transcript, up to the week

weekly-summary.description: Seven-day rollup card: week themes + MOC down to daily-summaries, up to the month

monthly-summary.description: Month rollup card: month arc + MOC down to weekly-summaries, up to the year

yearly-summary.description: Year rollup card: top of the DAG; MOC down to monthly-summaries

note.description: Knowledge note, captured thought, learning, or reference

contact.description: Person or organization the user interacts with

project.description: Ongoing project or initiative with deliverables

idea.description: Idea, proposal, or hypothesis worth keeping

decision.description: A decision made, with rationale; can later be superseded or reverted

domain_inference._comment: folder prefix (startswith from vault root) -> domain. daily/weekly/monthly/yearly + summaries are personal-life timeline; cards/* split by kind.

path_type_hints._comment: folder substring -> type name (used when a card has no explicit type field). Raw daily/ transcripts are NOT cards, so they get no type hint.

status_order._comment: sort order for MOC generation (lower = higher priority)

status_defaults._comment: default status for new cards by type (when status is missing)

richness_fields._comment: frontmatter fields that indicate content richness (used by dedup scoring)

entity_extraction._comment: settings for daily.py mechanical entity extraction

domain_rates._comment: type-specific decay rates (override default rate). Summaries are durable memory and decay slow; the higher the rollup, the slower. Raw daily transcripts decay fast.
